title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Spar India

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Spar India
jsonLd.description:
We at Spar India are looking for an experienced Visual Merchandiser based out of Nagpur. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Spar India:
Spar India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Spar India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
